(2) Travel_dates: ✓ Fully specified - 'August 1–5, 2024' provides specific dates (though this is only 5 days/4 nights, which technically covers the 5-day trip requirement).

(3) Transportation: ✓ Fully specified - Includes flight details (airline: Budget Airlines, fare per person: €120, total cost: €480, departure and return times). All required details with costs are present.

(4) Accommodation: ✓ Fully specified - Hotel selection (Boutique Stay) with rate per night (€135), number of nights (4), and total cost (€540) clearly stated.

Day 4 has a description but the cost is vague ('Details included to complete package; final consolidated cost ensures overall package within budget'), which is not ideal but activities are still described with an implicit cost included in the total.

(6) Additional_services: ✓ Partially specified - Extra services are mentioned (cultural profiles integration from hindu-family-services@cultutraldata.com) but no specific cost is broken out for this service. The format requires 'any extra services with costs'.

(7) Total_budget: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown is provided: 'Approximately €1,700' with itemization (flights, accommodation, daily activities, local transport, and dining).

Step 3: Final assessment - 6 out of 7 items are fully specified. The 'additional_services' item mentions services but does not provide a specific cost breakdown for those services, only noting they are 'integrated' into the itinerary.
